summary: The user is experiencing issues with a rattling bathroom fan and is considering whether to repair or replace it. They also discussed their new towels from Bed Bath & Beyond and are seeking recommendations for a moisturizing shampoo due to hair loss concerns.
facts: The user has a bathroom fan that has been making a weird rattling noise for a few weeks. The user replaced their bathroom towels with a new set of four from Bed Bath & Beyond on the same day they did their laundry. The user purchased two blue and two white towels that are soft and comfortable. The user started using a hair mask once a week to help with hair loss. The user is looking for a good moisturizing shampoo to address hair loss.
